name: AWS Lambda Function Created with Admin Role
description: The creation of a Lambda function with an administrative role grants it elevated privileges, potentially allowing full control over AWS resources. While this can be intentional for operational needs, it may also indicate an attempt to escalate privileges or execute unauthorized actions. Monitoring such activity helps identify potential security risks and enforce the principle of least privilege.

rules.name: AWS Lambda Function Created with Admin Role

author: Sunil Bharti & David Agni
